data.body:
## Description

Remove v2 flat-file path entry and its associated comment from the allowlist config. Keep only the v3 event-sourced path entry.

File: plugins/dso/hooks/lib/review-gate-allowlist.conf

Remove lines 13-16 (the two-path comment explaining both v2 and v3, plus the v2 glob on line 16). Update the comment for line 17 to say only the v3 entry is needed now (the v2 directory no longer exists after epic d775-4a36 cleanup).

Resulting comment block should reference only the v3 event-sourced path.

## No RED test required
Removing an allowlist entry for a directory that no longer exists has no behavioral impact. This is pure config cleanup. Existing allowlist behavioral tests cover the remaining entries.

## Files to edit
- plugins/dso/hooks/lib/review-gate-allowlist.conf
